Public Class ManagedClusterManagedOutboundIPProfile Implements IJsonModel(Of ManagedClusterManagedOutboundIPProfile), IPersistableModel(Of ManagedClusterManagedOutboundIPProfile)

Docs.summary: Profile of the managed outbound IP resources of the managed cluster.

MemberSignature.Value: public ManagedClusterManagedOutboundIPProfile ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> Count
Public Property Count As Nullable(Of Integer)
member this.Count : Nullable<int> with get, set

Docs.summary: The desired number of outbound IPs created/managed by Azure. Allowed values must be in the range of 1 to 16 (inclusive). The default value is 1.

MemberSignature.Value: public int? CountIPv6 { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<int32> CountIPv6
Public Property CountIPv6 As Nullable(Of Integer)
member this.CountIPv6 : Nullable<int> with get, set

Docs.summary: The desired number of IPv6 outbound IPs created/managed by Azure. Allowed values must be in the range of 1 to 16 (inclusive).
